title: [PAPERS]
text: [PAPERS] The [PAPERS] section specifies default paper sizes available for printing to PostScript. Configuration file: psdfef.txt (Unix only) PaperName : Width Height (in millimeters) For example: [papers] A4: 210.0 297.0 Letter: 215.9 279.4 Legal: 215.9 355.6 Copy Related Links Page Sizes for PostScript Uniface supports standard US and ISO paper sizes for PostScript printing.
